AttachUploader.list: `Array<{fileUrl: string, filePath: string, status: 'choose' \ | 'uploading' \ | 'error' \ | 'success'}>` — 附件列表，默认 `[]`
AttachUploader.getUploadUrl: `(options: object) => string` — 获取上传地址
AttachUploader.formatHeaders: `(options: object) => object` — 格式化请求头
AttachUploader.formatPayload: `(options: object) => object` — 格式化请求体
AttachUploader.onFileChange: `(result: object) => void` — 文件变化事件
AttachUploader.onChange: `(list: Array, options: object) => void` — 变化事件
AttachUploader.onPreview: `(item: object, index: number) => void` — 预览事件
